name: Azure AD / Microsoft Entra ID (MSAL)
trigger: User clicks 'Sign in with Microsoft' on BiLoginComponent
flow: On 300: user has multiple profiles — slide to Choose Profile view
On 428: 2FA required (SMS or authenticatorApp) — slide to pin code view
persistence: LocalStorageItemNames.adLogin = '1' stored to allow silent SSO on next load

name: SAML2 SSO (Customer-Level IdP)

config_fields.MetadataUrl: URL to IdP SAML metadata XML
config_fields.EmailClaim: Claim attribute name for user email in assertion

flow: Customer configures SAML via CustomerSamlSettings (EntityId + MetadataUrl)
User logs in via IdP-initiated or SP-initiated redirect
Service validates assertion, extracts email from EmailClaim
User record created/matched; JWT issued same as standard login
scope: Per-customer — each Customer can have its own SAML IdP

name: SCIM 2.0 User/Group Provisioning
endpoints: ScimUsersController — CRUD on users via SCIM /Users
ScimGroupsController — CRUD on groups via SCIM /Groups

entity_mapping.Customer.ScimTokenUUID: Per-customer bearer token for SCIM access

flow: External IdP sends SCIM requests to /scim/users or /scim/groups
Users/groups created, updated, or deprovisioned in ServiceAlert

name: Email Service (Password Reset + SAML Provisioning)
triggers: User requests password reset — email contains link with PasswordResetToken (Guid) + expiry

name: TOTP Authenticator App (RFC 6238)
library: TwoFactorAuthNet (inferred from behavior; QR code generation + 6-digit code validation)
storage: User.AuthenticatorSecret (base32 seed, stored on User entity)
flow: GET /api/user/getauthenticatorsecretqr → returns base64 QR code image
User scans QR in authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
On subsequent logins: if user has authenticatorApp flag, slide to code=5 in BiLoginComponent

name: SMS Gateway (2FA PIN via SMS)
protocol: HTTP to SMS gateway (abstracted via ISmsService)
trigger: User requests 2FA code via SMS on login or UserService.send2FaCodeBySms()
